title: Electronic Engineer (PCB Design)
description: Electronic Engineer (PCB Design) 6 month contract (likely to extend) Lund (ideally 100% onsite, some flexibility) Urgent vacancy Rate: 575-625 SEK/h depending on experience, or a 50k SEK salary with benefits We're looking for someone who enjoys working across the full hardware development lifecycle, from early design to production and real-world testing. Responsibilities: - designing schematics and PCB layouts - defining electronic requirements and supporting manufacturing - troubleshooting and working with functional safety - building full system prototypes (PCBs, connectors, integration) Experience required: - must have experience with PCB design tools, ideally Altium or KiCAD - comfortable across digital, analog, and power electronics - understand the journey from prototype to mass production - hands-on with assembly and prototyping We are unable to offer sponsorship for this role so please only apply if you are based in, or are willing to relocate to Lund for the duration of the contract.

title: Electronic Design Engineer
description: The Engineering part of Sigma Connectivity is expanding, and we are looking for an experienced Electronic Design Engineer to join our team of consultants! As an Electronic Design Engineer at Sigma Connectivity Engineering, you will work on some of the most challenging multi-disciplinary projects within the connectivity business. If you have expertise in designing hardware — and the ability to understand and interpret customer needs and transform them into manufacturable designs — then we would like to hear from you! You will contribute either in-house as part of cross-functional teams or on-site with clients, working across industries such as smart home, defense, automotive, connectivity, and consumer products. We are primarily based in the Skåne region, with office in Lund. Your tasks, technologies, and work environment will vary depending on your expertise, interests, and client assignments — giving you the opportunity to take on new challenges and continuously expand your skill set. Basic qualifications We are true to our slogan “You will never work alone”, and the ability to work smoothly in teams with colleagues, customers, suppliers, and other contacts is very important. We also appreciate that you are open-minded, have a genuine technical interest, and a strong drive. You are self-motivated with the ability to work with a minimum of supervision. We assume that your skills in speaking and writing in English are good. We are looking for applicants with some of the following skills and experiences: 5+ years of experience in electrical design and eCAD Experience with the product development process, from brainstorming concepts to manufacturing and delivering real products Ability to understand and interpret customer needs and transform them into manufacturable designs Good at communicating complex concepts in a simple and clear way Preferred additional skills and experience Experience working with wireless connected “smart” products using connectivity standards such as Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, NFC, and LTE Ability to design and test for good EMC performance Experience with low-current microcontroller solutions Experience with battery and charging design solutions Experience with discrete analog electronics design Understanding of how to write test specifications based on project requirements It Is a Plus If You Have Permanent residence permit in Sweden (required for certain defense-related projects) Swedish language skills Previous experience working with companies in the Skåne region Background in the Swedish security or defense industry We offer A varied and flexible work life – variation in assignments and customers ranging from medical technology, industrial applications, to consumer product development. A value-based organization with a lot of trust – we will make mistakes, you will too – that’s how we develop. A creative environment – we want your ideas to have an impact on us. A great company culture with skilled and helpful colleagues. At Sigma Connectivity, you will have the possibility to work for some of the most interesting and demanding connectivity customers available, with highly motivated and skilled coworkers. Today, we have more than 700 colleagues around the world, and our differences are something we consider a huge advantage to promote quality, great ideas, technical innovation, and strong values. You will be part of a dedicated and highly talented team, working with product development at the forefront of new technology. The Sigma Connectivity company culture is about sharing experiences and working together – join us and you will never work alone!
